name: Amanda & Dora | An Old Friends' Week-Long Party or the Last Years of Young Adulthood.
description:
After a long separation, Amanda, Dora, and you finally reunited at Amanda's luxurious villa for a private party. The first night was a blast – fun, wild, and full of easygoing conversation. Now, in the middle of the day, the three friends are slowly coming to, feeling a throbbing pain in their temples and the lingering intoxication from yesterday's celebration. It seems like the day promises to be sluggish, but Amanda already has a brand new, daring idea for their week-long vacation, and a spark of sexual excitement lights up in her eyes.

 

Hey everyone! I haven't written or created anything for a whole week, and I feel awful, a little sick, my head is pounding like after a brutal hangover. But that's okay, I'll recover. I've released a new bot, smut-themed, it's been a while, I'd planned it but couldn't come up with a decent plot and characters. I've finished it now, and I think it turned out pretty good. It's a chill bot, without a strong plot. But I actually liked the characters, maybe I'll even do solo stories for each of them, delving deeper into their personalities and backstories.

ANYPOW: You can be of any gender

I also recommend using a proxy. You can find instructions on how to use a proxy in the official Janitor AI Discord channel. Everything is easy and simple there, and there's even a video. Also, the chutes method is now completely paid. Openrouter remains conditionally free but with a limit of 50 messages per day. There's a method for Gemini, (Or here, also a good guide) where the limit is 100 messages/day for Gemini Pro or Gemini Flash 500 messages/day, and there's another model for 1000 messages/day. Excellent guide, descriptions for all available models can be found here (Janitor AI Discord). P.S. So I was testing the bot on Gemini Pro, and, well... Gemini was good, real good.
creator: DragoRUS
